product_name: Abby & Noah Sensory Compression Vest for Women & Men | Autism Sensory Products for Kids | Soft & Wearable Hug for Sensory Seeking | ADHD Calming Vest Black, Adult Medium
short_description: Therapist-Designed Compression Hug: Our “wearable hug” provides comforting, hug-like sensory input ideal for adults and children with ADHD, Anxiety, Autism, or Sensory Processing Disorder. Its unique design provides calming, adjustable compression. Unlike bulky weighted blankets or Hugs, our compression Hug offers a snug, comfortable fit that feels like a hug, helping to calm and soothe. Designed to help manage sensory needs, it’s your cozy companion for school, work and everyday adventures. Move Freely: Ideal for managing ADHD, anxiety, autism, and sensory processing disorder, and it is designed to let you move naturally, so you or your child can play, learn, and explore while staying cool and relaxed. It’s sensory support that keeps up with your busy life! Adjustable Compression: With heavy-duty straps, you can customize the compression level to suit your needs, making it ideal for anyone seeking deep-pressure therapy. It’s all about finding your perfect fit.

product_name: Snugabye Adaptive Back Zip Convert-A-Foot Sleeper | Designed for Special Needs | Sizes Range 2-14 Years
full_description: This collection was designed with your special needs child in mind. Made from 100% polyester fleece, it is super soft and warm. The sleeper also features a back zipper, which we know helps when your child is uncomfortable in clothes. There is a zipper flap and outside tags, ensuring your little one can move worry and scratch free. The sleeper is also constructed with our convert-a-foot design, allowing for footless or footed style.

product_name: CBObaby Adaptive Bodysuit, Short Sleeve, Front Snap Closure, Special Needs Children and Teens
full_description: Discover comfort and functionality with this innovative adaptive bodysuit from CBObaby. Thoughtfully designed for children and teens with special needs, this short-sleeve bodysuit features a full-length front snap closure that provides easy access for medical devices and daily care routines. The 100% cotton construction offers supreme softness and breathability, while the tagless design and flat seams minimize sensory irritation. Perfect for those who use feeding tubes or require frequent access to abdominal areas, this bodysuit allows dignified and comfortable wear without removing the entire garment. Available in inclusive sizes from 3 Month’s to 20 Years, it’s specifically created for older children who need adaptive clothing solutions. The stretchy, soft fabric ensures unrestricted movement while maintaining a secure fit throughout daily activities. This essential piece combines practicality with comfort, making it an ideal choice for children with various needs, including those with sensory sensitivities. The short sleeve design offers versatility across seasons, while the high-quality construction ensures durability through regular wear and care.

product_name: Benefit Wear Anti-Strip Jumpsuit Clothing for Kids with Autism | One-Piece Autistic Children Clothing
full_description: Are you searching for the perfect nightwear or daily wear for your Child with Special-Needs? The Anti-Strip Casual Jumpsuit for autistic children is just what you need to give your child. This jumpsuit has high-quality cotton/polyester blend knit fabric which is soft, non-itchy, and perfect for wearing all day. The jumpsuit allows your kids with autism to have a very comfortable wearing experience while also helping to regulate their body temperature. Your child can wear this jumper on its own, as an undergarment. The 3/4 length sleeves help to provide protection and warmth for your arms. This autism sensory Anti-Strip jumpsuit packs numerous features that help children with special needs the most. One of the most prominent features of this jumper is that it features a long back zipper that runs from the neckline down to the waist. This large opening helps parents and caregivers have the much-needed space to provide care for autistic children. The tab and snap closures at the back neckline make it more difficult for the kids with autism to open and remove. The jumpsuit for kids helps to eliminate and discourage undressing, self toileting, or diaper removal. These Anti-Strip jumpsuits are perfect for kids with autism, tactile sensitivity, or sensory issues. The unisex style design for boys and girls made as the jumpsuit are available in both masculine and feminine colors. Available Sizes: S(6-8), M(10-12), L(14-16), and XL(18)

product_name: TescoRu Exclusive Back-Zip Onesie – Designed with a convenient back zipper for easy diaper changes
full_description: *** Helpful Tips *** Our Back-Zip Onesie is designed to offer a snug embrace. Its stretchy fabric accommodates wear over clothing or pajamas without necessitating a larger size. Should it feel too loose, consider opting for a size down for a snugger fit. The back zipper opens fully, catering to unique needs. We recommend partially zipping up (approximately 10%) before dressing your child to facilitate effortless dressing.

product_name: Sensory Sock,Small,3-5 Years, White Space Full Body Sock Provides Deep Pressure Input Sensory Toys for Autistic Children Perfect for Children with Sensory Processing Disorde
short_description: Choose a high-quality sensory sock made from premium fabric for your kids to ensure a comfortable and skin-friendly experience. This sock is lightweight and portable, so you can take it with you wherever you go! Our Dynamic Movement Sensory Sock comes in four sizes: Small (40”LX27”W), Medium (47”LX27”W), Large (56”LX28”W), and X-Large (69”LX28”W). You can select the appropriate size based on your child’s height. Sensory full-body socks offer a fun and alternative way to provide sensory experiences to the body. They can help increase body awareness, promote calmness, focus, and relaxation, making them ideal for children with ADHD, autism, or other spatial sensory challenges.
full_description: Choose a high-quality sensory sock made from premium fabric for your kids to ensure a comfortable and skin-friendly experience. This sock is lightweight and portable, so you can take it with you wherever you go! Our Dynamic Movement Sensory Sock comes in four sizes: Small (40”LX27”W), Medium (47”LX27”W), Large (56”LX28”W), and X-Large (69”LX28”W). You can select the appropriate size based on your child’s height. Sensory full-body socks offer a fun and alternative way to provide sensory experiences to the body. They can help increase body awareness, promote calmness, focus, and relaxation, making them ideal for children with ADHD, autism, or other spatial sensory challenges. Using sensory body socks can assist children in regaining a sense of balance and clarity when they feel overwhelmed. When inside the sock, children receive tactile items for therapeutic play, as well as proprioceptive and deep pressure input. These sensory inputs can have a calming and regulating effect, providing a compression sensation and deep pressure therapy. This charming and amazing body sock is excellent for tactile stimulation, sensory integration, understanding body boundaries, and self-expression. It is a must-have for home, clinic, or school-based sensory programs. The sock is suitable for children with sensory processing disorder (SPD), ADHD, autism, as well as typical children who enjoy the comforting feeling of a “hug”.

product_name: Special Supplies Sensory Compression Vest Deep Pressure Comfort (Blue, Meduim)
short_description: Home, Travel, and Classroom Use – Our versatile sensory vest can be worn wherever and whenever your child needs to calm down or feel more in control, including on long car rides, in class with friends or teachers, or out running errands Soft, Breathable, and Supportive – Designed to wrap comfortably over the shoulders and around the midsection our vest for kids lets them move, play, and experience life with natural mobility while staying cool and relaxed on the go Calming, Therapeutic Sensory Vest – This compression vest for kids with sensory issues helps relieve stress, anxiety, and overwhelming emotions caused by ADHD or autism, so your child can feel more focused, calm, and relaxed around others

product_name: THOMAS & FRIENDS 2 Pack Adaptive T-Shirts Sensory Friendly Toddler Sizes (2T – 5T)
full_description: Journey to the island of Sodor and get ready for an adventure with your kid’s favorite blue steam engine in these cute and comfy Thomas and Friends sensory friendly tshirts! This adorable pack of 2 adaptive short sleeve shirts is designed to be comfortable for kids with sensory processing disorder and sensitive skin with flat seams, a wider neck opening and hem, and a tag free design. Made of soft 100% cotton for all-day comfort, these stylish Thomas and Friends sensory friendly tees feature vibrant artwork of Thomas the Tank Engine and his friend Percy that your train enthusiast will be excited to wear! product_name: Women’s Easy Touch Adaptive Side Closure Pants
full_description: Easy Access Dressing – Terrific for Lowered Hand Dexterity Front Fold-Down Panel – Allows for Easy Slip-On Comfort Easy Closure – Secured with Adjustable Easy Touch Closures Elastic Waist – Stretchy for Enhanced Comfort Convenient Side Pockets – Handy Flap Pocket on Each Side These Adaptive Clothing Side Opening Fleece Pants for women with Easy Access have adaptive easy-on convenience! These sweatpants are great for those with arthritis or lowered hand dexterity. The Side fastening adjustable strips and front fold down panel give complete convenience. Silverts Easy Touch Closures helps daily tasks such as dressing and undressing whether is it assisted dressing or independent dressing . The back elasticized waistband and side flap pockets are additionally handy. This adaptive clothing track or sweat pant is terrific for elderly/seniors who suffer from arthritis or are disabled or wheelchair dependent. Made of comfortable quality fleece. Polyester-cotton-spandex fleece also known as sweat pant material.
